title: The system must be cost-effective.
description: The system must be affordable to many and have a competitive price compared to other systems in the market.

title: The system must be flexible.
description: The system must work effectively in different places and environments.

title: The system must have a user-friendly interface.
description: The system must be easy to use and have interactive features.

title: The system must be secure.
description: The system must store user account information securely.

title: The system must be scalable.
description: The system must support multiple users and interactions.
